title: cestrum amictum var. organense
intro: Cestrum amictum var. organense, also known as the Night-blooming Jasmine or Queen of the Night, is a plant species in the nightshade family that is native to South America. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic and sedative effects, which have been traditionally used to treat anxiety, insomnia, and muscle spasms. The health benefits of Cestrum amictum var. organense include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural anticonvulsant. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
